---
title: "Learning Object-Oriented Programming"
listing:
  contents: notes
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
---

Object Oriented Programming is one of the most important paradigms in software engineering. 

It's imporant to note that this isn't intended to be an highly academic resource or even a scientific research; these are just my notes and experiences, occasionally conveyed in an informal manner.  

## My Notes
